title: Verification email sent after successful registration
preconditions: User has completed the registration form with valid data
User has submitted the registration form successfully
Email sending dependency (DEP001) is available and operational
test_steps: Register a new user with valid first name, last name, email, phone, password, and confirm password
Observe the system response after registration
Check the email inbox of the registered email address
Open the email received from the system
Verify the sender email address
Verify the email subject line
Verify the verification link is a URL with a unique token
Verify the verification link is valid by clicking it and confirming account activation
expected_results: The system displays a success message indicating that a verification email has been sent
An email is received at the registered email address within a reasonable time (e.g., less than 30 seconds)
The email is sent from a valid system email address (e.g., noreply@example.com)
The email subject line clearly indicates it is a verification email (e.g., 'Please verify your email address')
The email contains a unique verification link
The verification link is a URL that includes a unique token or identifier
Clicking the verification link activates the account and allows first login

title: Verification link uniqueness across accounts
preconditions: Two separate user accounts have been registered successfully
Both users have received their verification emails
test_steps: Register user A with email 'userA@example.com'
Capture the verification link from the email sent to user A
Register user B with email 'userB@example.com'
Capture the verification link from the email sent to user B
Compare the two verification links
expected_results: The verification link for user A is different from the verification link for user B
Each link contains a unique token or identifier that is not reused

title: Verification link expires after 24 hours
preconditions: User has registered and received a verification link
System time can be manipulated or the test can wait for 24 hours
The verification link has not been clicked yet
test_steps: Register a new user and capture the verification link from the email
Wait for 24 hours and 1 second (or manipulate system time to simulate 24 hours passing)
Click the verification link in a browser
Observe the error message displayed on the verification page
Attempt to log in with the user's credentials
Observe the login error message
expected_results: The system displays an error message indicating that the verification link has expired
The error message is displayed inline on the verification page
The user is not redirected to a login or success page
The user account remains unverified
The login attempt fails with an error message: 'Please verify your email before logging in.'

test_data.wait_time_note: Wait for 24 hours and 1 second after registration before clicking the link

title: Attempt login with expired verification link
preconditions: User has registered and received a verification link
The verification link has expired (24 hours have passed)
User has not verified their email yet
test_steps: Register a new user and capture the verification link from the email
Wait for 24 hours and 1 second (or manipulate system time to simulate 24 hours passing)
Click the expired verification link
Observe the error message displayed
Attempt to log in with the user's credentials
Observe the login error message
expected_results: Clicking the expired link displays an error message: 'Verification link has expired. Please request a new verification link.'
The error message is displayed inline on the verification page
The user is not logged in automatically
The login attempt with the user's credentials fails with an error message: 'Please verify your email before logging in.'
The login error message is displayed inline on the login page

test_data.wait_time_note: Wait for 24 hours and 1 second after registration before clicking the link

title: Resend verification link after 60 seconds
preconditions: User has registered and received the initial verification link
User has not verified their email yet
The resend cooldown dependency (DEP002) is operational
test_steps: Register a new user and note the time of registration
Wait for 60 seconds after the initial verification email was sent
Click the 'Resend Verification Link' button or link
Check the email inbox for a new verification email
Open the new verification email
Verify the new verification link is different from the previous one
Click the new verification link to confirm it is valid and activates the account
expected_results: The system displays a success message: 'A new verification link has been sent to your email.'
A new verification email is received within a reasonable time
The new verification link is different from the previous one
The new verification link is valid for 24 hours from the time of resend
Clicking the new verification link activates the account and allows first login

test_data.wait_time_note: Wait exactly 60 seconds after the initial email before requesting a resend

title: Resend verification link before 60 seconds
preconditions: User has registered and received an initial verification email
User has not yet clicked the verification link
Less than 60 seconds have passed since the last verification email was sent
test_steps: Navigate to the resend verification link page or trigger the resend action
Attempt to request a resend of the verification link
Observe the system response
Check the email inbox for any new verification email
expected_results: The system rejects the resend request
An appropriate error message is displayed inline indicating that the user must wait 60 seconds before requesting another resend
No new verification email is sent

title: Resend verification link exactly at 60 seconds
preconditions: User has registered and received an initial verification email
User has not yet clicked the verification link
Exactly 60 seconds have passed since the last verification email was sent
test_steps: Navigate to the resend verification link page or trigger the resend action
Attempt to request a resend of the verification link
Observe the system response
Check the email inbox for a new verification email
expected_results: The system accepts the resend request
A new unique verification link is sent to the user's email
The user can use the new link to verify their account

title: Resend verification link at 59 seconds
preconditions: User has registered and received an initial verification email
User has not yet clicked the verification link
Exactly 59 seconds have passed since the last verification email was sent
test_steps: Navigate to the resend verification link page or trigger the resend action
Attempt to request a resend of the verification link
Observe the system response
Check the email inbox for any new verification email
expected_results: The system rejects the resend request
An appropriate error message is displayed inline indicating that the user must wait 60 seconds before requesting another resend
No new verification email is sent

title: Resend verification link at 61 seconds
preconditions: User has registered and received an initial verification email
User has not yet clicked the verification link
Exactly 61 seconds have passed since the last verification email was sent
test_steps: Navigate to the resend verification link page or trigger the resend action
Attempt to request a resend of the verification link
Observe the system response
Check the email inbox for a new verification email
expected_results: The system accepts the resend request
A new unique verification link is sent to the user's email
The user can use the new link to verify their account

title: Login blocked without email verification
preconditions: User has registered successfully but has not clicked the verification link
User is on the login page
test_steps: Enter the registered email address and password
Click the login button
Observe the system response
Verify the error message displayed
expected_results: The system does not allow the user to log in
An appropriate error message is displayed inline indicating that the email must be verified before first login
The user remains on the login page or is redirected to a page prompting email verification

title: Successful login after clicking verification link
preconditions: User has completed registration with valid data
User has received the verification email with a unique link
The verification link has not expired (within 24 hours)
test_steps: Open the verification link from the email in a browser
Observe the confirmation message displayed on the page
Navigate to the login page
Enter the registered email and password
Click the login button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
Verify the user's account status is marked as verified in the system
expected_results: The system displays a success message indicating the email has been verified
The user is redirected to the login page or a verification success page
The user is able to log in successfully and is redirected to the dashboard or home page
The user's account status is updated to 'verified' in the system

title: Verification email not sent when registration fails
preconditions: User is on the registration page
test_steps: Enter an invalid email address (e.g., missing '@')
Enter a valid password
Enter a matching confirm password
Submit the registration form
Observe the error message displayed
Check the email inbox for any verification email
expected_results: The system displays an inline error message for invalid email format
The registration is not processed
No verification email is sent to the provided email address
The user remains on the registration page

title: Multiple resend requests after cooldown
preconditions: User has completed registration but has not yet verified email
User has received the initial verification email
test_steps: Navigate to the resend verification link page or click the resend button
Wait 60 seconds
Click the resend button again
Wait 60 seconds
Click the resend button a third time
Check the email inbox for each resend request
Verify each new verification link is unique
expected_results: The first resend request is accepted and a new verification email is sent
The second resend request (after 60 seconds) is accepted and another verification email is sent
The third resend request (after another 60 seconds) is accepted and another verification email is sent
Each new email contains a unique verification link

title: Rate limiting on resend requests
preconditions: User has completed registration but has not yet verified email
User has received the initial verification email
test_steps: Click the resend verification link button
Immediately click the resend button again (within 60 seconds)
Wait 30 seconds and click the resend button again
Wait 59 seconds from the first request and click the resend button again
Observe the system response for each request
expected_results: The first resend request is accepted and a new verification email is sent
The second request (immediate) is rejected with an inline error message indicating the cooldown period has not elapsed
The third request (30 seconds) is rejected with an inline error message indicating the cooldown period has not elapsed
The fourth request (59 seconds) is rejected with an inline error message indicating the cooldown period has not elapsed

title: Email verification system dependency failure
preconditions: The email verification system (DEP001) is unavailable or returns an error
User is on the registration page with valid data
test_steps: Enter valid registration data (first name, last name, email, phone, password, confirm password)
Submit the registration form
Observe the system response
Check the system logs for error messages
Attempt to log in with the registered credentials
expected_results: The system does not create the user account or creates it in a pending state
The system logs the email sending failure with relevant details
The system displays a user-friendly inline error message indicating that the verification email could not be sent and to try again later
The user cannot log in because the account is not verified or not created

title: Token expiration and resend logic dependency failure
preconditions: User has successfully registered and received an initial verification link
The token expiration and resend logic dependency (DEP002) is configured to fail or is unavailable
User is on the verification resend page or has access to the resend functionality
test_steps: Simulate a failure of the token expiration and resend logic dependency (e.g., by stopping the service or returning an error)
User clicks the 'Resend Verification Link' button
Observe the system response and any error handling behavior
Check system logs for error messages related to the dependency failure
Verify the user's account status remains unchanged
expected_results: The system does not send a new verification link

The system displays a user-friendly inline error message indicating that the resend service is temporarily unavailable (e.g., 'Unable to resend verification link at this time. Please try again later.')
The system logs the dependency failure with appropriate error details (e.g., 'Token expiration/resend service unavailable')
The user's account status remains unchanged (still unverified)
The system does not crash or enter an unstable state

title: Verification email sent with correct sender and subject
preconditions: User has completed the registration form with valid data
User has submitted the registration form successfully
Email sending dependency (DEP001) is available and operational
test_steps: Register a new user with valid first name, last name, email, phone, password, and confirm password
Check the email inbox of the registered email address
Open the email received from the system
Verify the sender email address
Verify the email subject line
expected_results: The email is sent from a valid system email address (e.g., noreply@example.com)
The email subject line clearly indicates it is a verification email (e.g., 'Please verify your email address')
The email body contains a unique verification link

title: Verification link valid just before 24 hours
preconditions: User has registered and received a verification link
System time can be manipulated or the test can wait for 23 hours and 59 minutes
The verification link has not been clicked yet
test_steps: Register a new user and capture the verification link from the email
Wait for 23 hours and 59 minutes (or manipulate system time to simulate 23 hours and 59 minutes passing)
Click the verification link in a browser
Observe the system response
expected_results: The system accepts the verification link
The user's email is marked as verified
The user is redirected to a success page or login page
The user can log in successfully

test_data.wait_time_note: Wait for 23 hours and 59 minutes after registration before clicking the link

title: Verification link expired exactly at 24 hours
preconditions: User has registered and received a verification link
System time can be manipulated or the test can wait for exactly 24 hours
The verification link has not been clicked yet
test_steps: Register a new user and capture the verification link from the email
Wait for exactly 24 hours (or manipulate system time to simulate exactly 24 hours passing)
Click the verification link in a browser
Observe the system response
expected_results: The system displays an error message indicating that the verification link has expired
The error message is displayed inline on the verification page
The user is not redirected to a login or success page
The user account remains unverified

test_data.wait_time_note: Wait for exactly 24 hours after registration before clicking the link

title: Verification link clicked after successful resend
preconditions: User has completed registration with valid data
User has received the initial verification email
User has requested a resend after 60 seconds and received a new verification link
The new verification link has not expired (within 24 hours)
test_steps: Open the new verification link from the resend email in a browser
Observe the confirmation message displayed on the page
Navigate to the login page
Enter the registered email and password
Click the login button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
expected_results: The system displays a success message indicating the email has been verified
The user is redirected to the login page or a verification success page
The user is able to log in successfully and is redirected to the dashboard or home page

title: Login blocked after verification link expired
preconditions: User has registered successfully
User has received a verification link
The verification link has expired (24 hours have passed)
User has not clicked the expired link
test_steps: Navigate to the login page
Enter the registered email address and password
Click the login button
Observe the system response
Verify the error message displayed
expected_results: The system does not allow the user to log in
An appropriate error message is displayed inline indicating that the email must be verified before first login
The user remains on the login page or is redirected to a page prompting email verification

title: Verification email sent with correct link format
preconditions: User has completed the registration form with valid data
User has submitted the registration form successfully
Email sending dependency (DEP001) is available and operational
test_steps: Register a new user with valid first name, last name, email, phone, password, and confirm password
Check the email inbox of the registered email address
Open the email received from the system
Extract the verification link from the email body
Verify the link format is a valid URL with a token parameter
expected_results: The verification link is a valid URL (e.g., starts with 'https://')
The link contains a unique token or identifier as a query parameter (e.g., 'token=abc123')
The link does not contain any sensitive user information (e.g., password)

title: Verification link expiration after resend
preconditions: User has registered and received an initial verification link
User has requested a resend after 60 seconds and received a new verification link
System time can be manipulated or the test can wait for 24 hours from the resend time
test_steps: Register a new user and capture the initial verification link
Wait for 60 seconds and request a resend
Capture the new verification link from the resend email
Wait for 24 hours and 1 second from the resend time (or manipulate system time)
Click the new verification link in a browser
Observe the system response
expected_results: The system displays an error message indicating that the verification link has expired
The error message is displayed inline on the verification page
The user is not redirected to a login or success page
The user account remains unverified

test_data.wait_time_note: Wait for 24 hours and 1 second after the resend request before clicking the new link

title: Login blocked after multiple failed verification attempts
preconditions: User has registered successfully
User has received a verification link
User has attempted to click the verification link multiple times but it has expired or is invalid
test_steps: Navigate to the login page
Enter the registered email address and password
Click the login button
Observe the system response
Verify the error message displayed
expected_results: The system does not allow the user to log in
An appropriate error message is displayed inline indicating that the email must be verified before first login
The user remains on the login page or is redirected to a page prompting email verification
The system does not lock the account due to failed verification attempts

title: Verification email sent with token that expires after 24 hours
preconditions: User has completed the registration form with valid data
User has submitted the registration form successfully
Email sending dependency (DEP001) is available and operational
test_steps: Register a new user with valid data
Capture the verification link from the email
Extract the token from the verification link
Verify the token is stored in the system with a creation timestamp
Verify the token expiration is set to 24 hours from creation
expected_results: The verification link contains a unique token
The token is stored in the system with a creation timestamp
The token expiration is set to exactly 24 hours from the creation timestamp
The token is not expired at the time of verification

The user is not redirected to a login or success page
The user account remains unverified
The login attempt fails with an error message: 'Please verify your email before logging in.'

title: Attempt login with expired verification link after resend
preconditions: User has registered and received an initial verification link
User has requested a resend after 60 seconds and received a new verification link
The new verification link has expired (24 hours have passed since resend)
User has not verified their email yet
test_steps: Register a new user and capture the initial verification link
Wait for 60 seconds and request a resend
Capture the new verification link from the resend email
Wait for 24 hours and 1 second from the resend time (or manipulate system time)
Click the expired new verification link
Observe the error message displayed
Attempt to log in with the user's credentials
Observe the login error message
expected_results: Clicking the expired link displays an error message: 'Verification link has expired. Please request a new verification link.'
The error message is displayed inline on the verification page
The user is not logged in automatically
The login attempt with the user's credentials fails with an error message: 'Please verify your email before logging in.'
The login error message is displayed inline on the login page

title: Login blocked without verification after resend
preconditions: User has registered successfully
User has requested a resend of the verification link after 60 seconds
User has received the new verification link but has not clicked it
User is on the login page
test_steps: Enter the registered email address and password
Click the login button
Observe the system response
Verify the error message displayed
expected_results: The system does not allow the user to log in
An appropriate error message is displayed inline indicating that the email must be verified before first login
The user remains on the login page or is redirected to a page prompting email verification

title: Verification link clicked after multiple resends
preconditions: User has completed registration with valid data
User has received the initial verification email
User has requested multiple resends (each after 60 seconds) and received new verification links
The latest verification link has not expired (within 24 hours)
test_steps: Open the latest verification link from the most recent resend email in a browser
Observe the confirmation message displayed on the page
Navigate to the login page
Enter the registered email and password
Click the login button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
expected_results: The system displays a success message indicating the email has been verified
The user is redirected to the login page or a verification success page
The user is able to log in successfully and is redirected to the dashboard or home page
